---
name: Documentation task
about: Create a scoped documentation task for SurakshaNet AI
title: "[documentation] "
labels: "documentation"
assignees: ""
---

## Objective

Describe the specific outcome this task should deliver.

## Scope

List the exact module, document, screen, API, schema area, or workflow included in this task.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The task stays within the defined scope.
- [ ] The expected output is documented clearly.
- [ ] Relevant privacy and audit expectations are addressed.
- [ ] Follow-up tasks or blockers are noted.

## Files/folders allowed

`Docs/, README.md, and .github/`

## Testing notes

Describe manual checks, automated tests, documentation review, or validation steps required for this task.

## Security/privacy notes

Document any impact on user identity, location, evidence, helper safety, public publishing, authorization, or audit logs. If not applicable, explain why.
